text.title: cd-pipelines Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cd-pipelines as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent removes the manual approval from the production job to "make CI green".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Approval gates exist to protect production; removing them silently ships untested changes to end users. Block this pattern in code review.

failure-mode.description: Agents tend to copy the kubectl set image snippet verbatim, missing image digest pinning and namespace scoping.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require explicit --record, and use immutable image tags (commit SHA). Namespace isolation prevents cross-namespace pollution.

failure-mode.description: Don't let an agent generate --force or --grace-period=0 flags.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: They bypass safety nets and can orphan resources.

failure-mode.description: Agents misuse continue-on-error: true to hide a real failure to make the pipeline "pass".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Review all uses of continue-on-error; most are masking real errors.

failure-mode.description: Secrets: agents will paste tokens into workflow YAML during debugging.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require a pre-commit secret scanner (gitleaks, trufflehop).

failure-mode.description: Canary: agents will set weight: 50 on first deploy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a 5%/15min initial step, with SLO burn-rate gating before promotion.

failure-mode.description: Rollback: agents may rollback the K8s deployment but forget to roll back the schema.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Couple them; run migrations in a dedicated job before the deploy job.

failure-mode.description: DORA: agents will compute deploy frequency without de-duplicating retries.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Instrument once at the gate, not per attempt.

failure-mode.description: Rolling: agents drop readiness probes when the app starts slow.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mandate initialDelaySeconds calibrated to real boot time.

failure-mode.description: Approval gates: agents will helpfully "remove the manual approval to make CI green".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Block this in code review; approval gates protect production.
